text: Science has a clearer story about microglia roles than social media does. These tiny brain cells are often misunderstood. They’re not just support cells; they’re active defenders against infection. Microglia prune synapses, helping shape memories and learning. But too much activation can lead to neuroinflammation, affecting health. So, how can we support these vital cells? Stay curious. Like and follow for more science insights!
